title: Rule Change so SpaceX Should Join Sp500 6 Months After IPO
description: The S&P Dow Jones Indices has officially proposed rule changes where megacaps like SpaceX will be included into the index in 6 months instead of 12 months. title: Former head of ‘Pentagon’s think tank’ joins Anthropic
description: The strategy expert calls adaptation to AI a "civilizational" challenge.

title: Starcloud seeks more orbital data center funding shortly after unicorn status
description:
Starcloud is looking to raise at least $200 million in a deal that would double the two-year-old orbital data center startup’s valuation to about $2.2 billion, a source close to the situation confirmed.

title: How Shivon Zilis Operated as Elon Musk’s OpenAI Insider
description: Messages presented at trial reveal how Zilis, the mother of four of Musk’s children, acted as an intermediary between him and OpenAI.

title: Sources: Anthropic potential $900B+ valuation round could happen within 2 weeks
description: Anthropic is asking investors to submit allocations for the AI company’s latest fundraise within the next 48 hours, according to sources familiar with the matter.

title: Rivian (RIVN) lifts production capacity for its Georgia plant by 50% to 300K vehicles annually
description:
Rivian (RIVN) now expects to produce up to 300,000 vehicles at its Georgia manufacturing plant, a 50% increase from its initial estimate.

title: After dissing Anthropic for limiting Mythos, OpenAI restricts access to Cyber, too
description: OpenAI will begin rolling out its cybersecurity testing tool, GPT-5.5 Cyber only "to critical cyber defenders" at first.

title: OpenAI announces new advanced security for ChatGPT accounts, including a partnership with Yubico
description: OpenAI is launching additional opt-in protections for ChatGPT accounts. The new security initiative includes a new partnership with security key provider Yubico.

title: Elon Musk testifies that xAI trained Grok on OpenAI models
description: "Distillation" is a hot topic as frontier labs try to prevent smaller competitors from copying their models.

title: Elon Musk Seemingly Admits xAI Has Used OpenAI’s Models to Train Its Own
description: While answering questions under oath, Musk argued it’s standard practice for AI labs to use their competitors’ models.

title: OpenAI Rolls Out ‘Advanced’ Security Mode for At-Risk Accounts
description: OpenAI is rolling out Advanced Account Security for people concerned that their ChatGPT or Codex accounts could be potential targets of phishing attacks.

title: Cleo Labs secures €1.5M to scale AI-driven product compliance globally

title: Apptronik’s new CPO hire a major step in right direction
description:
Apptronik taps Waymo veteran Daniel Chu as CPO to lead its $935M transition from humanoid R&D to mass-market commercialization.

title: Rivian (RIVN) starts R2 production days after tornado hit factory, deliveries this spring
description:
Rivian officially started production of its R2 electric SUV at its Normal, Illinois plant today, marking the most critical milestone in the company’s history.
